description: Bypass admin panel — never cache authenticated HTML
Bypass dynamic APIs — forms, chat, captcha, revalidate
expression: (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/api/chatbot") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/api/captcha") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/api/revalidate") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/api/admin") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/purchase") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/apply")

description: Public HTML — respect CDN-Cache-Control from Next middleware
expression: (http.request.uri.path eq "/") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/insights") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/faq") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/courses") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/transformations")
